source: Google Search Status Dashboard (Ranking, 2021+) merged with curated seed

updates.name: March 2018 Core
updates.note: First explicitly named broad core update.

updates.name: August 2018 “Medic”
updates.note: Hit YMYL hard: health and finance.

updates.name: June 2019 Core
updates.note: First update announced in advance.

updates.name: May 2020 Core
updates.note: Big update during the pandemic.

updates.name: December 2020 Core
updates.note: Highly volatile.

updates.name: June 2021 Core
updates.note: Part 1 of 2.

updates.name: July 2021 Core
updates.note: Part 2 of 2.

updates.name: November 2021 Core
updates.note: Rolled out despite the shopping season.

updates.name: Aug 2022 Helpful Content
updates.note: First version of the Helpful Content System.

updates.name: Sept 2023 Helpful Content
updates.note: Hit small publishers hard.

updates.name: October 2023 Core
updates.note: Coincided with a spam update.

updates.name: November 2023 Core
updates.note: Several systems back-to-back at year's end.

updates.name: March 2024 Core
updates.note: Largest core update ever; ~45 days.

updates.name: March 2024 Spam
updates.note: New policies: scaled content, expired domains.

updates.name: August 2024 Core
updates.note: Incorporated feedback after the 2023 HCU.

updates.name: November 2024 Core
updates.note: 24-day rollout.

updates.name: December 2024 Core
updates.note: A week after the November one.

updates.name: December 2024 Spam
updates.note: A day after the core update finished.

updates.name: March 2025 Core
updates.note: Volatility similar to December 2024.

updates.name: June 2025 Core
updates.note: Brands partially recovered after the HCU.

updates.name: num=100 change
updates.note: Removed &num=100 — broke part of GSC data.

updates.name: December 2025 Core
updates.note: 18-day rollout.

updates.name: February 2026 Discover Core
updates.note: First core update for Discover only.

updates.name: March 2026 Spam
updates.note: Shortest spam update ever — under 20 hrs.

updates.name: March 2026 Core
updates.note: Two days after the spam update.

updates.name: May 2026 Core
updates.note: Launched the day after Google I/O.
